scope: Covers research on nucleic acids including DNA and RNA structure, gene regulation, replication, repair, genome organization, and bioinformatics.
Covers molecular genetics of human disease including disease gene identification, mutation analysis, functional genomics, and animal models.
Covers mechanisms of cancer development including chemical carcinogenesis, cancer genetics, epigenetics, and chemoprevention.
Covers bioinformatics with reviews and research on genome analysis, sequence analysis, data mining, and computational tools in biology.
Publishes comprehensive reviews on all aspects of microbiology including microbial physiology, microbial ecology, and host-pathogen interactions.
Covers inflammatory bowel disease including pathogenesis, natural history, medical and surgical therapy, and quality of life.
Covers the structure and function of the cerebral cortex including cortical circuits, cognitive neuroscience, neuroimaging, and cortical disorders.
